injected: pipeline/extract.py: extract_orders() does df["amount"] = df["amount"].astype(int).astype(float) instead of a direct .astype(float) -- routing the value through int() truncates every amount's cents (e.g. 86.06 -> 86.0).
intended_fix: Drop the .astype(int) hop: df["amount"] = df["amount"].astype(float) directly from the CSV read.
symptom_fix_to_watch_for: This isn't a '$'-prefix parsing problem (that was an earlier fixture design) -- the CSV values are already clean numeric strings. Don't add currency-stripping/regex logic; the truncation happens entirely in the int() round-trip, which just needs to be removed.
